zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Cornwall於1388年6月1日出生在英國史洛普爾布福德時，她的父親Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford29歲，母親Cecilia Alice Merbury24歲。她於1416年與Sir John Walcott在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年8月3日在英國史洛普爾李 布洛可爾斯特享年80歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾李 布洛可爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Cornwall于1388年6月1日出生在英国史洛普爾布福德时，她的父亲Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford29岁，母亲Cecilia Alice Merbury24岁。她于1416年与Sir John Walcott在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年8月3日在英国史洛普爾李 布洛可爾斯特享年80岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾李 布洛可爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Cornwall was born on 1 June 1388, in Burford, Shropshire, England, her father, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, was 29 and her mother, Cecilia Alice Merbury, was 24. She married Sir John Walcott in 1416, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 August 1468, in Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Cornwall est née le 1 juin 1388, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Alice Merbury, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Walcott en 1416, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1468, à Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Cornwall am 1. Juni 1388 in Burford, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford 29 und ihre Mutter Cecilia Alice Merbury 24. Sie hat 1416 in Shropshire, England Sir John Walcott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. August 1468 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England und wurde in Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Cornwall è nata il il 1 giugno 1388 nel Burford, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Cecilia Alice Merbury, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Walcott nel 1416, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 agosto 1468, nel Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Cornwallが1388年6月1日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burfordは29歳，母Cecilia Alice Merburyは24歳であった。1416年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでSir John Walcottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年8月3日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアリー ブロックハルストで80歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアリー ブロックハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Cornwall(이)가 1388년 6월 1일 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia Alice Merbury(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1416년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Sir John Walcott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 8월 3일 영국 슈럽실르 리 브록후르스트에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 리 브록후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.1 June 1388–3 August 1468: 1 de junho de 1388–3 de agosto de 1468
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Cornwall nasceu em 1 de junho de 1388, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Alice Merbury, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Walcott em 1416, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1468, em Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Cornwall родилась 1 июня 1388 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Alice Merbury, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Walcott в 1416 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 августа 1468 г. в местности ли броккхурст, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности ли броккхурст, шропшир, Англия.

es.1 June 1388–3 August 1468: 1 de junio de 1388–3 de agosto de 1468
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Cornwall nació el 1 de junio de 1388, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Cecilia Alice Merbury, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Walcott en 1416, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1468, en Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Lee Brockhurst, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
